THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA ROBERT J. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA NANCY  DBA. 3314  16TH ST. APTS.
